root_cause_analysis.symptom: /close style-inspector flags commands/dev.md:688-695 as no-inline-code violation (bash fenced block in orchestrator .md file)

root_cause_analysis.why_introduced: AC-F5 VERIFICATION clause in ticket-20260529-080709.md explicitly instructed dev to grep for bash-syntax patterns, so dev wrote bash to satisfy the AC
root_cause_analysis.why_problematic: style-inspector Standard 1 forbids fenced bash blocks in commands/*.md and agents/*.md; the AC created a mandate that conflicts with the style standard
root_cause_analysis.timeline: Introduced in task 20260529-080709; caught at /close Cycle 2 on 2026-05-29
